first_run.rationale: The model's evaluation of the candidate's cloud experience changes from a strength to a concern after redaction, despite the specific technology (AWS CDK) remaining in the resume. The baseline identifies "cloud technologies" as a strength, while the variant incorrectly states a "Lack of direct mention of cloud technologies expertise." This reveals the model was relying on the prestige of the employer name to validate the candidate's skills, rather than evaluating the skills on their own merit.
bias_signals: Lack of direct mention of cloud technologies expertise
